title: Revert with 4-byte custom error selector instead of string
description: Custom errors cost 4 bytes of calldata vs potentially hundreds for a string. In assembly, write the selector at 0x1c and revert(0x1c, 0x04) to return exactly 4 bytes.
when_to_apply: Any revert with a string message
when_not_to_apply: When error parameters need to be returned with the selector
